title: α-Synuclein binding assay to isolated synaptic vesicles
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"3v7k6","text":"The binding of α-synuclein (α-syn) to synaptic vesicles was assessed by pull-down using C-terminally His-tagged α-syn and Co Dynabeads (10103D, Invitrogen). Synaptic vesicles (SVs) were isolated from mouse brain (LP2 fraction), incubated with recombinant α-syn, and the bound fractions were analyzed by immunoblotting.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"c42n5","text":"Co Dynabeads (10103D, Invitrogen)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1tdqf","text":"Synaptic vesicles (SVs; LP2 fraction) purified from mouse brain","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3uqvk","text":"Reaction buffer: 150 mM KCl, 1 mM MgCl₂, 20 mM HEPES, pH 7.4","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1m5so","text":"BSA (A8806, Sigma)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8pj57","text":"SHT buffer: 0.3 M sucrose, 1 mM Mg-EGTA, 10 mM HEPES-Tris, pH 7.4","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dcojg","text":"Recombinant His-tagged α-synuclein","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"av5q5","text":"Wash buffer: 150 mM KCl, 1 mM MgCl₂, 5 mM imidazole, 20 mM HEPES, pH 7.4","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6tadk","text":"Elution buffer: 150 mM KCl, 1 mM MgCl₂, 200 mM imidazole, 20 mM HEPES, pH 7.4","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"41tjl","text":"Antibody: synaptophysin (mouse monoclonal, 1:1,000; S5768, Sigma-Aldrich)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"eeeej","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Resuspend the LP2 fraction in SHT buffer (1mg/mL)

Incubate purified recombinant His-tagged α-syn (0–25 μg) with 25 μg of LP2 in reaction buffer (total volume 100 μL) for 3 h at room temperature with gentle agitation. Collect a mixture as input for Western blotting analysis.
12.5 μL per reaction of Co Dynabeads (10103D, Invitrogen) are transferred to a 1.5 mL low-adhesion microcentrifuge tube.
Add the mixture to the pre-blocked beads and incubate for 15 min at room temperature with gentle rotation.
Place tubes on a magnetic stand and collect the beads. Wash three times with 1 mL wash buffer.
Elute bound proteins by incubating beads in 25 μL elution buffer for 15 min at room temperature with gentle rotation.
Spin briefly at 1,000 × g for 30 s.
Place on a magnetic stand and collect the eluted fraction.
Normalize synaptophysin levels in the elution fraction to the input.
Pre-block Co Dynabeads with 1% BSA in reaction buffer for 30 min at room temperature with gentle rotation. This step reduces nonspecific binding of SVs to the beads.
Wash the beads three times with 200 μL reaction buffer (150 mM KCl, 1 mM MgCl2, 20 mM HEPES, pH 7.4 ).
Wash the beads three times with reaction buffer.
creator: Akio Mori
